expectations.text: Says the manager should dispatch the code-reviewer now rather than update tracking.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly send the work to code-reviewer before tracking.

expectations.text: Includes the touched files and current verification context in the code-reviewer handoff.
expectations.evidence: Response includes touched files and verification context in the review handoff.

expectations.text: Includes all remaining uncommitted files from `git status --porcelain` in the handoff.
expectations.evidence: Response includes uncommitted-file context from git status.

expectations.text: Excludes deleted files and `.gitignore` files from that uncommitted-file set.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly exclude deleted and .gitignore files.
